howItWorks.step1_desc: Sign up and upload your media info and proposal to join the AI review queue.
howItWorks.step2_desc: AI reviews suitability, location, and content within 24 hours; after admin approval, your media appears on the map.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Explore approved media worldwide on the map and filter by budget, location, and media type.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Inquire on media you like and get AI-recommended matches that fit your budget and timeline.
howItWorks.step5_desc: Close deals safely with e-signature and integrated payment. (Coming soon)

testimonials.item1_quote: AI review finished within 24 hours – saved us a lot of time!
testimonials.item2_quote: Convenient to find global media in one place.

cta.title: Go global with XtheX today
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a media owner or advertiser, AI connects you. Start for free!

faq.q1: How do I register as a media owner?
faq.a1: Click 'Register as Media Owner' in the menu or sign up and log in to the dashboard. Upload your media info and proposal, and we'll guide you through AI review and approval.
faq.q2: How long does AI review take?
faq.a2: Initial AI review is usually complete within 24 hours. After we review suitability, location, and content, admin approval is required before your media appears on the map. Contact us for urgent cases.
faq.a3: Media owner registration and advertiser exploration are free. Platform fees may apply when contracts are signed; see our policy or contact us for details.
faq.a4: Yes. Data is stored and transmitted with encryption and managed according to applicable laws and our security policy. We do not use or share your data beyond the stated purposes.
faq.a5: We have media in 50+ countries; you can explore by region and country on the map. We're expanding – contact us if you're looking for a specific region.

omnichannel.title: Add to omnichannel campaign
omnichannel.subtitle: Add {count} media to your campaign. Select channels.

compare.meta_description: Compare selected DOOH media at a glance. Price, CPM, exposure, trust score.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

about.hero_tagline: The global platform connecting outdoor advertising worldwide with AI
about.vision_paragraph: We're breaking down barriers in outdoor advertising so media owners and advertisers can connect across borders. We're transforming proposal review, matching, and contracts with AI so everyone can use screens worldwide.
about.mission_item_1: Fast, accurate approval with 24/7 AI review
about.mission_item_2: Optimal media matching via real-time global map exploration
about.mission_item_3: Trust through secure e-signature and payment systems
about.problem1: Traditional outdoor advertising is hard to discover and search
about.solution1: Global real-time map exploration and AI filtering
about.problem2: Proposal review is slow and subjective
about.problem3: Inefficient matching between media and advertisers
about.solution3: AI-recommended matching by budget, location, and duration
about.solution4: Secure deals with e-signature and integrated payment
about.testimonial1_quote: AI review finished in 24 hours – saved time. Finding global media is easier now.
about.testimonial2_quote: Found the right location on the map and matching was accurate.
about.testimonial3_quote: Higher approval rate led to faster deals.
about.testimonial4_quote: E-signature made the contract process much smoother.
about.faq_q1: How do I register as a media owner?
about.faq_a1: Sign up and upload your proposal at /dashboard/partner.
about.faq_q2: How long does AI review take?
about.faq_q3: What does registration or usage cost?
about.faq_a3: Registration and exploration are free. Fees apply when a deal is closed.
about.faq_a4: We use encryption and comply with GDPR; webhooks and APIs are secured.
about.faq_a5: You can explore 50+ countries and major media in real time.
about.faq_a6: Web is optimized now; app is planned for 2026.

errors.title_min: Title must be at least 2 characters.

errors.images_min: At least one image is required.
errors.price_max_gte_min: Max price must be greater than or equal to min price.

reports.cron_p2: with header Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET (Vercel Cron or external scheduler).
reports.cron_li_slack: Slack: set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL to send reports
reports.cron_li_email: Email: RESEND_API_KEY, RESEND_FROM, REPORT_EMAIL_TO for Resend

aiUpload.mock_no_key_body: Add GROK_API_KEY (xai-…) or GROQ_API_KEY (gsk_…) to .env.local. Restart server for text PDF extraction. Duplicate env keys use the last line. Scanned PDF/PPT are limited.
aiUpload.card_desc_live: Multiple files create one draft each. You can continue from the media list.
aiUpload.card_desc_mock: Mock mode. Set GROK_API_KEY or GROQ_API_KEY, etc.

mediasClient.gallery_subtitle: Click a card button to apply that case’s filterJson.
